title: Is there gonna be a Q and Final
display_title: Is there gonna be a Q and Final
wikitext:
[]: Is there gonna be a Q and Final?             Quote Post by facespace » Wed Jul 28, 2010 12:14 am Well since Anno (and his wife) left Gainax, and they have the rights to the Evangelion tittles, are the last two movies gonna be release on time/ at all? Or are they just not gonna have the Gainax name with them?

[]: Re: Is there gonna be a Q and Final?             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Jul 28, 2010 12:17 am facespace wrote: Well since Anno (and his wife) left Gainax, and they have the rights to the Evangelion tittles, are the last two movies gonna be release on time/ at all? Or are they just not gonna have the Gainax name with them?

[]:             Quote Post by facespace » Wed Jul 28, 2010 12:20 am Oh I thought they were in cooperation with Gainax. Well this was silly.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Wed Jul 28, 2010 12:21 am ^ This. Even on various merchandising stuff, like the Revoltech Evas made after the designs used in the movies, you can see the copyright logo of Khara. Also, Anno's wife, Moyoco Anno, was never associated with Gainax.

[]: Re: Is there gonna be a Q and Final?             Quote Post by Gamer137 » Wed Jul 28, 2010 12:21 am Sachi wrote: They never had the Gainax name to begin with. NME is a product of Studio Khara.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jul 28, 2010 12:31 am The credits has Gainax as the original copyright holder, or something along the lines of that, the theatrical programs has all the credits transcribed. Edit: It's "Original Collaboration", and some kind of copyright management: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=94860#94860

[]: Re: Is there gonna be a Q and Final?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jul 28, 2010 7:16 am facespace wrote: Well since Anno (and his wife) left Gainax, and they have the rights to the Evangelion tittles, are the last two movies gonna be release on time/ at all? Or are they just not gonna have the Gainax name with them?

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Wed Jul 28, 2010 10:06 am Well, GAINAX was on the copyright notice of Rebuild 1.0, but it just said KHARA on the copyright notice of Rebuild 2.0. And I'm going by the original Japanese copyright notices that flash at the very end of the films, so I'm guessing they were still working out the fine print during 1.0 and they finally got the rights by 2.0. And that is assuming they perform like a western company; but this is Japan so things maybe different over there...

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Wed Jul 28, 2010 12:59 pm Anno left Gainax after 1.0 but before 2.0 according to his biography. If it was going to affect anything seriously, it would have affected 2.0.

[]: Re: Is there gonna be a Q and Final?             Quote Post by facespace » Wed Jul 28, 2010 3:23 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: You're assuming that the Japanese run companies like a western company. If Gainax says "you cannot haz", then Gainax would be responsible for enraging an entire horde of otaku. And Gainax is like the studio for otaku. What do you think that would do to them business wise?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Jul 28, 2010 3:45 pm Putting the stop on anything Evangelion-related is the stupidest possible move Gainax could make. It'd be like the LOST guys saying, "You know what? We have enough money, let's not broadcast the final episode."
summary:
[]: Is there gonna be a Q and Final?             Quote Post by facespace » Wed Jul 28, 2010 12:14 am Well since Anno (and his wife) left Gainax, and they have the rights to the Evangelion tittles, are the last two movies gonna be release on time/ at all? Or are they just not gonna have the Gainax name with them?

[]: Re: Is there gonna be a Q and Final?             Quote Post by Sach
